response.justification: Maria has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP protocols, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in customer-facing technical discovery — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Experienced in AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven track record in building scalable cloud systems (AWS, Kubernetes, microservices)
Active open-source contributor with demonstrable technical leadership and mentoring
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization in resume
AI experience appears secondary to general full-stack work; duration unclear for production AI systems
Lacks documented experience leading technical discovery sessions with enterprise customers
